title: BossBar Toggle
description: A simple client-side mod that lets you show or hide the boss bar using commands like /bossbar toggle, /bossbar on and /bossbar off.
body:
# BossBar Toggle

A simple and lightweight **client-side mod** that lets you show or hide the boss bar whenever you want — no need to restart the game!

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `/bossbar toggle` | Toggle the boss bar on/off |
| `/bossbar on` | Show the boss bar |
| `/bossbar off` | Hide the boss bar |
| `/bossbar status` | Check the current state |

## Features
- ✅ Lightweight and client-side only
- ✅ Works on any server (vanilla, modded, etc.)
- ✅ Boss bar data is preserved — re-enabling restores it instantly
- ✅ Simple commands, no config files needed

## Requirements
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
